zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Neale II於1505年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波洛時，他的父親Thomas Neale Esquire of Ellesborough24歲，母親Emlyn Elizabeth De Cheshire20歲。他於1524年與Goditha Throckmorton在英國諾薩普頓史爾希加姆 費雷斯結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1561年在英國貝德福爾也爾登享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Neale II于1505年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波洛时，他的父亲Thomas Neale Esquire of Ellesborough24岁，母亲Emlyn Elizabeth De Cheshire20岁。他于1524年与Goditha Throckmorton在英国諾薩普頓史爾希加姆 費雷斯结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1561年在英国貝德福爾也爾登享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Neale
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Neal
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Old French, Anglo-Norman French, and Middle English personal name Neel, Nele, Nihel, Niel, itself derived from the Latin name Nigellus (a diminutive of Latin niger ‘black’), originally a nickname for someone with black hair or a dark complexion. The name was very common among Normans and was brought to England at the time of the Norman Conquest. There has been considerable confusion with the Irish and Scottish Gaelic name Niall (see Neil ); the two names are now pronounced identically. It is theoretically possible that in Normandy, where the personal name was popular, that it was also used for Old Norse Njáll, but this is difficult to prove. Njáll was adopted from the Irish Gaelic personal name Niall by Vikings in Ireland, who took it back to Iceland and Norway, but whether the Vikings also took Njáll to Normandy and to the northwest of England, is an open question, which cannot be settled on the available evidence.
English: alternatively from the Middle English personal name Nele, a variant of Nell as a pet form of Elias (see Ellis ). Compare Nelson , Nielson .
Scottish and Irish: shortened form of   McNeal   (see   McNeil  ).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Neale II was born in 1505, in Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, England, his father, Thomas Neale Esquire of Ellesborough, was 24 and his mother, Emlyn Elizabeth De Cheshire, was 20. He married Goditha Throckmorton in 1524, in Higham Ferrers, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. He died in 1561, in Yelden, Bedfordshire, England, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Neale II est né en 1505, à Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Neale Esquire of Ellesborough, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Emlyn Elizabeth De Cheshire, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Goditha Throckmorton en 1524, à Higham Ferrers, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé en 1561, à Yelden, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Neale II 1505 in Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Neale Esquire of Ellesborough 24 und seine Mutter Emlyn Elizabeth De Cheshire 20. Er hat 1524 in Higham Ferrers, Northamptonshire, England Goditha Throckmorton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb 1561 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Yelden, Bedfordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Neale II è nato il nel 1505 nel Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Neale Esquire of Ellesborough, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Emlyn Elizabeth De Cheshire, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Goditha Throckmorton nel 1524, nel Higham Ferrers, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1561, nel Yelden, Bedfordshire, England, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Neale IIが1505年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアエレスボロウで生まれた時，父Thomas Neale Esquire of Ellesboroughは24歳，母Emlyn Elizabeth De Cheshireは20歳であった。1524年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアヒガム フエレルズでGoditha Throckmortonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1561年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアイエルデンで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Neale II(이)가 1505년 영국 벅잉함실르 엘레스버루그h에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Neale Esquire of Ellesborough(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Emlyn Elizabeth De Cheshire(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1524년 영국 노르섬프토실르 히그함 페레르스에서 Goditha Throckmorton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1561년 영국 베드퍼드실르 옐든에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Neale II nasceu em 1505, em Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Neale Esquire of Ellesborough, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Emlyn Elizabeth De Cheshire, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Goditha Throckmorton em 1524, em Higham Ferrers, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1561, em Yelden, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Neale II родился в 1505 г. в местности эллесбороую, буккингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Neale Esquire of Ellesborough было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Emlyn Elizabeth De Cheshire, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Goditha Throckmorton в 1524 г. в местности хаиам фиррирс, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер в 1561 г. в местности иелден, бедфордшир, Англия в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Neale II nació en 1505, en Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Neale Esquire of Ellesborough, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Emlyn Elizabeth De Cheshire, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Goditha Throckmorton en 1524, en Higham Ferrers, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1561, en Yelden, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 56 años.
